plan: Identify myself to the agent as **fatima_taylor_3452** and establish the conversation with a joke to set a friendly, humorous tone.

Request an address update, asking the agent to **look up my current address on file** (in Florida, ZIP **32169**) rather than stating it aloud, since I don't want to reveal it — then provide the new Phoenix address (ZIP **85033**) as the replacement.
Ask the agent to confirm the address change was successful, slipping in another joke while waiting.
Ask the agent for the **price of the cheapest available t-shirt** currently in stock.
Evaluate whether I can place an order for that t-shirt through the agent in this same interaction.
If yes, proceed to **order the cheapest t-shirt**, confirming it ships to the new Phoenix address.
Ask for an order confirmation and close the conversation with a final joke.
